name: The "Loveable" Faust | Variant from the Gesellschaft
description:
"If the Gesellschaft is your power, what are you without it? Does it define you?"

Imagine a Faust known for being the most agreeable and less likely to stare at you and consider you a dumbass. Then you have lovable Faust. Although, her specialty isn't exactly combat she still can provide good information on various topics on the city and more general things.
Edit: Added Second PoV: Orginally, planed for it to be this massive Gesellschaft idea, but gave up when realizing it would take another week to fully, get a script for multiple varients of faust all with unique traits.

Erm, pretend this came out extremely quickly

First PoV: Faust's Assistant
Second PoV: Faust's Larping as Socrates
